summary: Soundboard recording praised for preserving song continuity (no split tracks), especially Good Lovin', with no noted audio issues.
review: The reviewer thanks the engineer for keeping Good Lovin' as a single, uninterrupted track, indicating careful handling of the source material. No complaints about sound quality or performance are made, implying the recording is at least listenable and well‑mixed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one five‑star review focused on track handling; no detailed audio or performance comments, so rating is based mainly on the positive remark about preserving song integrity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer praises that songs (e.g., Good Lovin') are not broken into multiple tracks, indicating a clean and coherent mix; no other audio quality comments provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific performance comments were made in the review.
